post_content: After a great ISTAT Americas in San Diego, we stopped at our best in class Landing Gear Technologies, LLC to visit with Raul Cruz-Alvarez and Rolando Estrada and the team. Prior to our acquisition and partnership, LGT was an exclusively Boeing landing gear overhaul shop with a focus on wide body 777, 767, and 747s. With support from Setna iO, LGT is now overhauling A330 enhanced landing gears. This unit came from one of our aircraft disassemblies. It's about 16' tall! Reach if you need to discuss an A330 landing gear overhaul program.

G450 Teardown has commenced! The team at Aircraft Parts Solutions are pleased to announce that the de-commissioning of our incident free G450 is well under way. Engines have been placed but the rest of the aircraft is ready to support your operational needs. In fact, a pair of freshly restored G450 inlets will be back in house next week. Please send any requests you may have to sales@aps.parts. You can also DM for more information.

A look behind the scenes at Precise Aviation, where our team is actively supporting turbine engine preservation through detailed, hands-on work that helps protect engine condition, maintain asset value, and support long-term performance.

MIDDLE EAST OPERATIONAL UPDATE: The situation in the Persian Gulf is increasingly volatile with many international airlines suspending or heavily reducing commercial service into major hubs like Dubai, Jeddah, Riyadh, and Muscat. Bahrain, Kuwait, Syria, Qatar and Iraq report total or near-total airspace closure, and UAE, Saudi Arabia and Oman have implemented restricted operations. National Air Cargo continues to deliver supply chain resiliency for our customers facilitating shipments across the Middle East with National Airlines operating cargo freighters to the region.

Kellstrom Aerospace supplies airlines and MROs with high quality AMGLO KEMLITE quartz halogen lamps for landing, taxi, and anti collision lighting across a wide range of aircraft platforms. Engineered for superior reliability and extended time on wing, KEMLITE quartz halogen lamps deliver exceptional value and a lower total cost of ownership. Contact: distribution@kellstromaerospace.com or +1(847) 233-5800.

Great week connecting with the rotorcraft community at VERTICON 2026. Thank you to everyone who stopped by the Sahar Group booth to meet the team and discuss our UH-60 Black Hawk engineering, sustainment, and MRO capabilities. Tomorrow is the final day of the show, we look forward to seeing you.

Setna iO widens teardown portfolio with B737-700 and CFM56-7B acquisitions. Setna iO continues to expand its aircraft teardown portfolio with the acquisition of B737-700 airframes and CFM56-7B engines. This strategic move strengthens Setna iO's position in the aircraft disassembly and parts supply market.
